#!/bin/bash

# UPC runtime simulation script
# Usage: upcrun -n <num_threads> -shared-heap <heap_size> <executable> <args...>

NUM_THREADS=1
SHARED_HEAP="256MB"
EXECUTABLE=""
ARGS=()

while [[ \$# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case \$1 in
        -n)
            NUM_THREADS="\$2"
            shift 2
            ;;
        -shared-heap)
            SHARED_HEAP="\$2"
            shift 2
            ;;
        *)
            EXECUTABLE="\$1"
            shift
            ARGS=("\$@")
            break
            ;;
    esac
done

if [[ -z "\$EXECUTABLE" ]]; then
    echo "Usage: upcrun -n <num_threads> -shared-heap <heap_size> <executable> <args...>"
    exit 1
fi

# Set UPC environment variables
export UPC_THREADS="\$NUM_THREADS"
export UPC_SHARED_HEAP="\$SHARED_HEAP"

# Run the executable
exec "\$EXECUTABLE" "\${ARGS[@]}"
EOF
",

    }
  ]
}
